headline: Intel Stock Notches Gains for 7th-Straight Day. Why It Hit a Nearly 5-Year High Today.
summary: Intel stock has been on an incredible run and the gains just keep on coming.  The chip company’s stellar streak was under threat early Thursday until it announced a multiyear collaboration with  Google  to advance the next generation of artificial intelligence and cloud infrastructure.  Essentially, the Alphabet owner will keep using Intel’s chips.

headline: T. Rowe Price Expands Fixed Income Platform Through CLO Launch
summary: TROW enters the CLO market with a $403.6M issuance, aiming to expand fixed income offerings and tap higher-income credit opportunities.

headline: Nvidia Invests In CPU Chip Startup SiFive
summary: Nvidia has taken a stake in SiFive, a chip startup that designs processors using the RISC-V standard.

headline: BX Navigates Market Volatility on Stable Fee Revenues: Is It a Buy?
summary: Blackstone leans on rising fee-based revenues and record AUM to weather volatility, but premium valuation and credit market risks cloud upside.

headline: Intel Stock Soared 43% in Just 6 Days. This Google Boost Is  Driving It Even Higher Today.
summary: The chip company’s stellar streak was under threat early Thursday until it announced a multiyear collaboration with  Google  to advance the next generation of artificial intelligence and cloud infrastructure.  The stock rose 1.5% in early trading, after initially trading more than 1.5% lower in premarket trading.  Intel announced it was joining  Tesla  and SpaceX’s Terafab project—Elon Musk’s semiconductor production plan, which he has described as the “most epic chip building exercise in history.”

headline: SiFive Raises $400 Million to Accelerate High-Performance RISC-V Data Center Solutions; Company Valuation Now Stands at $3.65 Billion
summary: SANTA CLARA, Calif., April 09, 2026--SiFive, the gold standard for RISC-V processor IP, today announced it has raised $400 million in an oversubscribed Series G financing to accelerate its high-performance data center roadmap. This equity funding round was led by Atreides Management with other A-list investors* including Apollo Global Management, NVIDIA, Point72 Turion, and T. headline: Why Intel Stock Soared 43% in Just 6 Days—and Why It’s Dropping Today
summary: The chip company’s stellar streak is under threat early Thursday as the shares pointed 1.7% lower in premarket trading.  The move lower also appears to be tied to broader market weakness—and creeping doubts about the U.S.-Iran cease-fire agreement.  Intel announced it was joining  Tesla  and SpaceX’s Terafab project—Elon Musk’s semiconductor production plan, which he has described as the “most epic chip building exercise in history.”
